title: Fragment: Music And Sweet Poetry.
content:
How sweet it is to sit and read the tales
    Of mighty poets and to hear the while
    Sweet music, which when the attention fails
    Fills the dim pause -
meaning:
Percy Bysshe Shelley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragment: Music And Sweet Poetry."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
